group.label: Multiple Root Element Detection
group.comment: A Magewire component must render a single root element. This setting controls how a violation is reported. It applies in all modes (developer and production), so choose "Off" to disable detection entirely.

field.label: Behavior
field.comment:
Throw exception – aborts the render and shows the Magewire exception block (default).
Browser console error – renders the page and logs the violation to the browser console.
Server log – renders the page and records the violation in the server log.
Off – disables detection (no parsing overhead).
